# Trait

**Structure**

A struct representing a package’s trait.

## Declaration

```swift
struct Trait
```

## Overview

Traits can be used for expressing conditional compilation and optional dependencies.



## Initializers

- **init(name:description:enabledTraits:)**: Initializes a new trait.

## Instance Properties

- **description**: The trait’s description.
- **enabledTraits**: A set of other traits of this package that this trait enables.
- **name**: The trait’s canonical name.

## Type Methods

- **default(enabledTraits:)**: Declares the default traits for this package.
- **trait(name:description:enabledTraits:)**: Initializes a new trait.

## Configuring Traits

- **traits**: The set of traits of this package.

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- ExpressibleByExtendedGraphemeClusterLiteral
- ExpressibleByStringLiteral
- ExpressibleByUnicodeScalarLiteral
- Hashable
